Correction: Set pump to maintain 20 psi at softener.

Put control momentarily into brine/slow rinse.
Replace or repair air check if needed. (Contact
dealer.)

Problem:
System using more or
less salt than regenerant
setting.
Cause:
Foreign matter in controller causing
incorrect flow rates.
Correction:
Remove brine control and flush out foreign matter.
Manually position control to brine/slow rinse to
clean controller (after so doing position control to
"purge” to remove brine from tank).
Set pump to maintain 20 psi at softener.

Put control momentarily into brine/slow rinse.
Replace or repair air check if needed. (Contact
dealer.)

Problem:
Control backwashes or
purges at excessively low or
high rate.
Correction:
Replace with correct size controller. (Contact
dealer.)
Remove drain controller and clean ball and seat.
